name: The Original Blocc Crips
description: The Original Blocc Crips are a predominately African-American street gang located in the unincorporated section of Los Angeles County known as Athens. Their turf lays between Normandie (east) and Western Avenues (west) from 107th Street (north) to Imperial Highway (south). This section of South Los Angeles is policed by the Lennox Department of the Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department, but it is adjacent to the City of Los Angeles to the north.
